response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and leadership in dev practices. His only minor gap is limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles, but his broad language proficiency and adaptability mitigate this.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven expertise in AI-agent systems and developer tooling, directly matching a key required skill
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and dev practices (TDD, code reviews, workshops) with open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in recent roles, though Node.js and architecture experience are strong
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (last seen in 2018), with no recent enterprise backend examples
German language proficiency is only basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
